- [x] Add `uri2run` stream transports: `stdio`, `sse`, `ws`.
- [x] Surface `uri2run` runtime transport hints in `uri3 explain`.
- [x] Add `uri2run` protocol transports: `docker`, `ssh`, `mcp`, `a2a`.
- [x] Sprint 4 architecture hardening: doctor boundary checks, envelope tests, CLI_MAP.
- [x] CI gate: `scripts/ci/architecture_gate.sh`, `.github/workflows/ci.yml`, `make architecture-gate`.

- [x] Add `hypervisor run-agent --wait-healthy --supervise-repair auto`.

## Self-Healing Runtime

- [x] Distinguish `process.running` from `health.ok` in agent inspection.
- [x] Detect health URI drift between deployment registry and runtime state.
- [x] Include recent `log://` ERROR entries in agent inspection payloads.
- [x] Add bounded restart and runtime `health_uri` sync repair strategies.
- [x] Evolutionary repair layer: `hypervisor/repair/` (classifier, playbooks, policy, supervisor).
- [x] Schema-valid incidents (`schemas/incident.schema.json`) under `output/incidents/{date}/{agent}/`.
- [x] Repair memory: `knowledge/repair_cases/` + `hypervisor repair diagnose|apply|learn`.
- [x] Evolution proposals from unresolved incidents (`evolution/proposals/from_incident_*.yaml`).
- [ ] Add port conflict classifier using socket/lsof probes without killing unrelated processes.
- [ ] Add safe deployment registry update proposal when effective runtime port differs from declared `health_uri`.
- [ ] Add `health://agent/{deployment}` and `repair://agent/{deployment}/auto` URI schemes or resolver aliases.
- [ ] Add policy-gated strategies: rebind port, kill stale owned process, regenerate agent, rollback to last known good artifact.

## Examples & Testing

- [ ] Full autonomous repair loop: log classification → regenerate agent → registry rollback (uri-healer / uri2repair).
- [ ] `hypervisor supervise --watch` long-running daemon mode.

## urigen Roadmap

- [x] Scaffold `packages/urigen` with CLI entrypoint and workspace wiring.
- [x] Implement side-effect-safe `urigen plan` and `urigen verify`.
- [x] Implement isolated `urigen generate` for `ecosystem.yaml`, README,
  capabilities, flows, contracts, deployments and tests.
- [x] Implement `urigen explain` with `uri3 explain` runtime path data.
- [x] Keep `urigen apply` approval-gated and non-mutating in MVP.
- [x] Add package boundary rule forbidding low-level runtime transport imports.
- [ ] Add JSON Schema validation to `urigen plan` and `urigen generate`.
- [ ] Expand generator profiles: `minimal`, `agent`, `voice`, `operator`,
  `provider`, `full`.
- [ ] Implement idempotent `apply` steps for contracts, capabilities, flows and
  deployment fragments with `created/updated/unchanged/skipped/blocked` status.
- [x] Add `hypervisor run-agent --if-running reuse|restart|fail` integration for
  future `urigen apply`.
- [ ] Export richer `markpact` README blocks for capability, flow, deploy and
  test sections.
- [ ] Add recovery report handling and optional `uri2verify replay --create-test`
  integration when `urigen verify` fails.
